title: Quinze
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Quinze |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Outbound Flight Colony]]''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' **[[Peacekeeper (Outbound Flight Colony)|Peacekeepers]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Who's on Quarantine duty?''"
"''Perry and Quinze.|Dillian Pressor and Trilli|}} '''Quinze''' was serving a term as one of the [[Peacekeeper (Outbound Flight Colony)|Peacekeepers]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. As such, Quinze enforced the laws of the [[Outbound Flight Colony]], the government established by those who survived the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] survey [[Starship/Legends|ship]] [[Outbound Flight Project|''Outbound Flight'']] after it crashed in a [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] called [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]]. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[Human]] [[Trilli]] mentioned to fellow crewman [[Dillian Pressor]] that Quinze was assigned to guard the [[Quarantine section]], where the colony kept [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] children under surveillance, alongside [[Perry]]. ==Behind the scenes== Quinze was mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Quinze }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Outbound Flight Peacekeepers]]
